kyc.html-title: The last identity form you'll ever fill out
kyc.title: The last identity form you'll ever fill out
kyc.subtitle: Create a portable digital identity that can be reused at multiple companies when you need to verify your identity. All it takes is one click.
kyc.disclaimer: Footprint will not be able to access (or decrypt) any sensitive data. We will only get access to your name, phone, and email address.

kyb.html-title: Accurate, reliable, and fast KYB verification for your business
kyb.title: The simplest way to verify businesses.
kyb.subtitle: Accurate, reliable, and fast KYB verification for your business
kyb.disclaimer: Footprint will not be able to access (or decrypt) any sensitive data. We will only get access to your business name, phone, and email address.

ending.description: Next time you see the Footprint button, you can be certain your data is protected.
ending.title: Your identity is safe.
ending.subtitle: The next time you see the Footprint button, you can be certain your data is protected.

new-approach.title: A new approach to privacy.
new-approach.description: Your PII is secured with Footprint, so you can safely allow companies to access it whenever you want, however you want. Regain the ownership of your data.

zero-trust.title: Zero-trust by design
zero-trust.description: Our API ensures only the right parties can access the data they're allowed to see.

end-to-end.title: Transparency first
end-to-end.description: Know exactly what data is accessed and when.

granular-data.title: Granular data access
granular-data.description: Only decrypt the bare minimum you need, control who can access what. Nothing else leaves our enclave-backed vaults.

secure-enclave.title: Secure enclave backed
secure-enclave.description: Our advanced PII vaults use strong cryptography and are built on top of secure Nitro Enclaves.

animation.end: Next time, verifying your identity will be as easy as this!

404.title: Oops! Page not found.
404.description: We're sorry, but the requested page doesn't exist or was removed.
